历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 3980 → 3763 → 3539 → 5332 → 6407. It stabilized in the 3500–4000 range from 2021 to 2023, then significantly dropped to 5332 in 2024, and further to 6407 in 2025, with a cumulative decline of about 2868 positions over the past two years, showing a clear downward trend. The 2025 baseline is approximately 6407. The enrollment plan for this university in Chongqing's Physics Category was 65 in 2021, 59 in 2022, 59 in 2023, 62 in 2024, and 65 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 66, a slight expansion of about 1.5% compared to 2025, with limited impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its ranking on the Soft Science China University Main Ranking has been stable around 39–41 in recent years (approximately 39th in 2026), making it a top-tier 211 university in science and engineering, with a very high reputation in the field of electronic information. In 2022, it received somewhat negative evaluations due to an academic misconduct incident. In 2025, it received somewhat negative evaluations due to a campus bullying incident. Its comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is 60th (relatively popular), with a certain level of attention on short video platforms. No obvious enrollment gaps have been recorded. Its disciplines include Information and Communication Engineering (A+), Electronic Science and Technology (A+), Computer Science and Technology (A), Cyberspace Security (A), and Mechanical Engineering (A-), making it nationally top-tier in electronic information and computer fields, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication majors were highly recommended in 2024, Computer majors continue to be recommended, and Electrical Engineering and Automation is highly recommended. Xidian's core majors are all in high-demand ranges. The number of Physics Category examinees in this province increased from 98,954 in 2021 to 139,478 in 2025, with an estimated 136,895 in 2026, a slight decrease from 2025. Xidian is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, and Chongqing is in the same western region, with moderate regional preference. The university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Chongqing (about 65 students), making it an important source of students in the southwestern region.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous downward trend in rankings over the past two years, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (about 1.5%), the slight decrease in Physics Category examinees in this province, and the sustained high popularity of Electronic Information/Computer majors, based on the 2025 baseline of 6407, the expansion effect and the decrease in examinees roughly offset each other. Major popularity exerts slight upward pressure on rankings (decreasing numbers), but the strong downward inertia from the past two years suggests that the 2026 minimum ranking will be approximately 6436, with a range of 5936–6936.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Category (including Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Intelligent Science and Technology, Cyberspace Security, etc.)
- Electronic Information Category (Communication)
- Electronic Information Category (Integrated Circuits/Electronic Science/Electronic Engineering)
- Computer Science and Technology (Excellence Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information Category (Aerospace Information)
- Automation Category (Intelligent Manufacturing and Intelligent Measurement and Control)
- Management Science and Engineering Category (Digital and Business Intelligence Integrated Training).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Microelectronics Science and Engineering (Zheng Yue Academician Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 5936–6936, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (below 5936), you can focus on Computer Category (Intelligence/Cyberspace Security/Excellence Class) and Electronic Information Category (Communication/Integrated Circuits) and other A+ discipline majors. If your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (about 6936), it is recommended to prioritize relatively stable majors such as Management Science and Engineering Category.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 2782 → 3537 → 3385 → 3241. The ranking was optimal in 2022 (2782), significantly dropped to 3537 in 2023, and slightly recovered in 2024–2025, with a fluctuation range of about 755 places in the past 3 years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 3241. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Chongqing was 7 students in 2022, 6 in 2023, 6 in 2024, and 6 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 6 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 39–41 on the Soft Science main ranking, a top-tier science and engineering 211 university, but only offers Foreign Language and Literature majors in the History Category, which has low relevance to the university's main engineering strengths. In 2022, it received a somewhat negative evaluation due to an academic misconduct incident; in 2025, it received a somewhat negative evaluation due to a campus safety incident. Douyin popularity ranking is 60 (relatively popular), but the popular content mainly revolves around engineering majors, with limited impact on foreign language majors. The university's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in electronic information and computer science, while the History Category enrollment major (Foreign Language and Literature) has no corresponding A-level discipline evaluation, resulting in weak disciplinary support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Foreign language majors were evaluated as 'generally wait-and-see' in 2024, with stable and low popularity. The number of History Category candidates in the province was 69,770 in 2022 → 73,373 in 2025, estimated at approximately 72,105 in 2026, a slight decrease compared to 2025. Xidian is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, in the same western region as Chongqing. Only one major (Foreign Language and Literature) is offered in the History Category, with a very small enrollment (6 students), so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the ranking fluctuation trend over the past 3 years, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a slight decrease in History Category candidates in the province, and the generally average popularity of foreign language majors, based on the 2025 baseline of 3241, the decrease in candidates exerts slight downward pressure on the ranking (numerical increase), but the plan remains unchanged and major popularity is stable. The estimated 2026 minimum ranking is approximately 3256, with a range of 2768–3744.

Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Foreign Language and Literature (New Liberal Arts International Language and Electronic Information Cross-Integration Training) (including English, Japanese, Translation).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The History Category only offers one enrollment major, Foreign Language and Literature, with no tier selection options. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 2768–3744 can apply for this major. Those with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (below 2768) may consider better choices at other universities, while those with rankings close to the upper limit (approximately 3744) still have a chance of admission.
